name: First Community Bank
description_short: Corpus Christi's First Community Bank branch at 416 N Water St in TX provides full banking services at this downtown location.
description_long:
First Community Bank operates a branch location at 416 N Water St in downtown Corpus Christi, TX. This standalone banking facility serves Corpus Christi residents and local businesses seeking in-person banking services. The downtown Corpus Christi location is positioned in the city's commercial core for convenient access.

At this 416 N Water St location in Corpus Christi, customers can access standard banking services including account management, deposits, withdrawals, and financial consultations. For detailed information about services or to speak with a representative, customers are encouraged to visit the branch in person or contact First Community Bank directly.

If you're a Corpus Christi resident or business owner needing banking services, bring a valid ID and any relevant financial documents. First Community Bank's downtown branch serves as a reliable option for personal and business banking needs in Corpus Christi, TX.
services: Personal checking accounts (Community Checking, Community Interest Checking, Community Gold, Money Market Plus)
Personal savings accounts and Certificates of Deposit
Youth checking and savings accounts (Teens Club, Kids Club)
Business checking accounts (Business Checking, Simple Business Plus, Simple Business Checking, Business Interest Checking)
Business savings and money market accounts
Small business loans and SBA loans
Digital banking and online account management
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Comprehensive personal and business product lines under one institution
Youth banking accounts (Teens Club, Kids Club) designed to build financial literacy
Multiple checking account tiers with varying interest-bearing options
Specialized agricultural loan products for farm and ranch customers
Treasury management and fraud solutions for business customers
Multiple branch locations with ATM/ITM network access
Digital banking services and online account management available
cons: Website does not display specific interest rates, APYs, or fee schedules—customers must contact bank directly for pricing
Limited information about loan terms, approval requirements, or qualification criteria
No online account opening process visible on website; likely requires in-person or phone application
Unclear geographic service area—website doesn't specify states or regions served
No clear information about small business loan limits, SBA loan details, or equipment financing terms

contact.address: 416 N Water St, Corpus Christi, TX 78401

best_for: Small business owners seeking integrated banking and lending services with personal relationships
Families with children interested in youth savings accounts and financial education
Agricultural customers needing specialized farm and ranch financing
Individuals and businesses valuing community-focused banking with branch accessibility
diagnosis: First Community Bank is best for small business owners, families, and individuals seeking traditional community banking with established branch access and FDIC insurance. The primary caveat is the lack of transparent pricing information on their website—customers will need to contact the bank directly to compare rates, fees, and loan terms against competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
